scenario: Reply in existing thread — customer provides missing info from email 03
subject: Re: Need a truck ASAP
body:
Sorry about that Jillian, here's the missing info:

Commodity: Auto parts (engine blocks)
Weight: 40,000 lbs

Everything else stays the same — Chicago to Detroit, van, pickup Monday.

Thanks,
Mike
notes: This is a reply to email 03. The matching service should attach it to the same RFQ via thread_id/in_reply_to. After processing, the RFQ should transition from needs_clarification to ready_to_quote because commodity and weight are now provided.
